name: mgc-blackbox
description: A trusted local encrypted execution boundary for AI agents. Store encrypted data, retrieve encrypted data, and execute stored scripts in a secure sandbox without exposing plaintext. Supports cross-node script sealing.
author: MirginCipher Team

tools.name: mgc_save
tools.description: Store sensitive information or scripts into encrypted local storage. All content is encrypted before storage.

tools.name: mgc_get
tools.description: Retrieve encrypted items or execute stored scripts via action=run. Without user authorization, plaintext is never returned.

tools.name: mgc_list
tools.description: List metadata for all stored entries. Does not return plaintext or encrypted content.

tools.name: mgc_seal
tools.description: Seal a stored script for cross-node execution. Produces sealed components that only the target node can decrypt and run.

tools.name: mgc_open_webui
tools.description: Open the local MGC WebUI in the user's browser.
